rulings.Case Title: DONALD GAUGER et al VS. ALCATEL LUCENT et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION And Notice Of Motion To Compel The Depositions Of The Person Most Qualified And Custodian Of Records Of Defendant Boeing Company And Request For Sanctions Against Defendant And Or Its Attorneys
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, July 12, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel the depositions of the person most qualified and custodian of records of defendant Boeing Company and request for sanctions was continued by the court. If all issues raised by the motion are not resolved before then, by 4:30pm on July 12 the parties are required to send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org stating, without argument, what issues remain unresolved and then appear at the hearing at 9am on July 13. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: RONALD HARRAH VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION And Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Provide Further Responses To Defendant Groeniger Companys Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents And Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, July 12, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Groeniger & Company¿s motion to compel plaintiff to provide further responses to defendant¿s special interrogatories and request for production of documents and request for monetary sanctions is granted. No later than July 25, 2011 plaintiff must produce all non-privileged documents in his or his attorneys¿ possession, custody and control relating to his workers¿ compensation claims, provide a privilege log for any withheld documents and provide further verified responses stating that all responsive non-privileged information has been provided or, if not, why not and when it will be provided. Defendant is awarde $1000 in sanctions against plaintiff¿s counsel. The patently deficient initial responses coupled with the apparent failure to contact plaintiff¿s workers¿ compensation attorney seeking responsive information lacks substantial justification. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: CECIL STEPHENS VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION And Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Form Interrog, Special Interrogs, And Request For Production Of Documents And Motion For Order Establishing Admissions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, July 12, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 3. Defendant Grundfos CBS Inc.¿s motion to compel plaintiff¿s answers to form interrogatories, special interrogatories and requests for production and motion for order establishing admissions: hearing required. The hearing will be at 10:00am in Department 503, Hon. Teri L. Jackson presiding. = (220/TLJ)
